work_order.project_title: Midnight Signals — AI Spooky Short for Teens
work_order.objective:
You are creative-dev for project 'spooky-teen-shortfilm' (Campfire Repeat: 3D woods, five teens, cell service dies; relighting the campfire snaps time back 5 minutes). Deliver rough storyboards before 3D lookdev.

Goal
- Create 10 rough storyboard frames (PNG), readable beats, grayscale or flat color OK.
- 16:9 master framing with center-safe composition (we will derive vertical later).

Deliverables & Paths
- Save frames to: /home/james/Hermes/state/projects/spooky-teen-shortfilm/storyboards/v0/
  - Filenames: storyboard_f01.png ... storyboard_f10.png
- Generate a 3x4 or 4x3 contact sheet: storyboard_contact_v0.png
- Optional captions file alongside: storyboard_captions_v0.csv

Use These Inputs
- Brief: storyboards/storyboard_brief.md
- Manifest (10 frames with shot refs, windows, must-includes): storyboards/storyboard_manifest_v0.csv
- Beats: beats_campfire-repeat.md
- Shot list: shot_list_v0_campfire-repeat.md
- VO outline: vo_script_outline_campfire-repeat.md
- Style cues: lookdev/shader_ramps.md (for lighting mood only; boards can stay simple)

Creative Guardrails
- Sub–Rated R/PG-13: suspense over gore.
- Phone battery persistence and the loop rule must be visually legible in at least one frame.
- Distinct teen silhouettes (hoodie, beanie, flannel, puffer, varsity) — readable in moonlight.

Acceptance for v0
- 10 PNGs present with clear blocking/lighting intent.
- Contact sheet present.
- Center-safe action.

When done, print an index of produced files with dimensions. If you need to synthesize visuals, use quick sketch/paint or your image tools; fidelity can be low as long as beats read.

delivery_model.strategy_label: Lead -> Creative -> Game Dev -> App Dev
acceptance: Sub-R rating guardrails enforced; animated 2D stylized look; deliverables: style_bible.md, shot_list_v0.md, vo_script_v0.md

stage_guidance.operator: Own scope, freeze the delivery target, and keep the handoffs honest.
stage_guidance.creative-dev: Define the creative target, vision guardrails, and artifact acceptance language before implementation drifts.
stage_guidance.app-dev: Own the app, tooling, portal, and review-loop support needed to make the chosen artifact reviewable and repeatable.

handoff_contract: freeze one primary delivery target before downstream implementation expands scope
treat creative-dev as the vision and acceptance guardrail for downstream lanes
treat game-dev as the owner of the playable implementation path once the vision is frozen
treat app-dev as the owner of portal, tooling, packaging, and review-loop support after the build path is clear
require each lane to leave a concrete handoff for the next lane instead of sending the operator back into open-ended review

work_order.project_now: Animatic v0 placeholders generated (22 slates); contact sheet exported. ffmpeg unavailable on host, so frames + build script ready for later render.
work_order.project_next: Begin Blender lookdev: block camp set, fire/fog rigs, toon shader ramps; generate 3–4 rendered styleframes for approval.

acceptance: Sub-R rating guardrails enforced; animated 2D stylized look; deliverables: style_bible.md, shot_list_v0.md, vo_script_v0.md

structured_result.summary: Verified existing storyboard v0 pack (10 frames + contact sheet + captions). Loop rule reads. Battery persistence not visually legible; f03 needs a center-safe OTS phone UI with clear time and %; f02 motif needs a slight upward nudge.
implemented: Loaded and reviewed manifest, brief, beats, shot list, VO, and shader ramps.
Verified existence and dimensions of 10 PNG frames and contact sheet.
Vision QA on contact sheet and key frames (f01, f02, f03, f07, f08).
verified: Loop/relight visually suggested (concentric ripples, ember-to-flare progression).
Distinct teen silhouettes readable in multiple frames; center-safe generally respected.
assumed: 1280x720 drafting resolution is acceptable for v0 per brief.
3x4 contact sheet is acceptable even with two non-frame slots (12-tile grid).
blocked: Local image tooling missing (no PIL/Pillow, no ImageMagick), so I could not patch f03/f02 or regenerate the contact sheet during this run.
risks: Battery persistence requirement is unmet visually; reviewers may flag story logic readability.
Minor center-safe drift on f02 may complicate later 4:3/crop derivations if not corrected now.
next_actions: Install lightweight image tooling (Pillow) in the environment.
Patch f03: add center-safe OTS phone UI with large '12:00 AM' and persistent '%', plus OTS shoulder; update caption remains the same.
Adjust f02: nudge ignition ripple motif upward ~10–15% to fit inside safe guide.
Regenerate storyboard_contact_v0.png from the 10 frames (3x4 grid; fill last 2 tiles as reserved).
Re-run visual QA to confirm battery persistence and center-safe compliance.
Hand off updated v0 pack to app-dev for portal packaging/review loop.
